case_title: PAULINE YOUNG VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-12-2019 - ONLY APPEARANCE AT TRIAL CALL IS BY ANNE CHERRY BARNETT, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. -- COUNSEL STATES THAT SHE WILL FILE A DISMISSAL FOR THE CASE, AS APPELLANT PAULINE YOUNG TOLD HER THAT SHE NO LONGER WANTS TO PURSUE THE CASE. BUT SINCE NO ACTUAL DISMISSAL IS YET FILED WITH THE COURT AT THE TIME OF TRIAL CALL, THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
